questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望在 AWS 雲端中運行其實驗工作負載。該公司有雲端支出預算。該公司的財務長擔心每個部門的雲端支出責任。 CFO 希望在支出門檻達到預算的 60% 時收到通知。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to run its experimental workloads in the AWS Cloud. The company has a budget for cloud spending. The company's CFO is concerned about cloud spending accountability for each department. The CFO wants to receive notification when the spending threshold reaches 60% of the budget. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在 AWS 資源上使用成本分配標籤來標記擁有者。在 AWS 預算中建立使用預算。新增警報閾值，以便在支出超過預算的 60% 時接收通知。
A.en: Use cost allocation tags on AWS resources to label owners. Create usage budgets in AWS Budgets. Add an alert threshold to receive notification when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Cost Explorer 預測來決定資源擁有者。使用 AWS 成本異常偵測在支出超過預算的 60% 時建立警報閾值通知。
B.en: Use AWS Cost Explorer forecasts to determine resource owners. Use AWS Cost Anomaly Detection to create alert threshold notifications when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.

C.zh: 使用 AWS 資源上的成本分配標籤來標記擁有者。使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 上的 AWS Support API 在支出超過預算的 60% 時建立警報門檻通知。
C.en: Use cost allocation tags on AWS resources to label owners. Use AWS Support API on AWS Trusted Advisor to create alert threshold notifications when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Cost Explorer 預測來決定資源擁有者。在 AWS 預算中建立使用預算。新增警報閾值，以便在支出超過預算的 60% 時接收通知。
D.en: Use AWS Cost Explorer forecasts to determine resource owners. Create usage budgets in AWS Budgets. Add an alert threshold to receive notification when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.

A.zh: 正確。成本分配標籤可以幫助標記資源擁有者以啟用部門級成本追蹤。正確：AWS Budgets 允許用戶建立預算並設定警報閾值，以便在支出達到一定百分比時發送通知。此選項完全滿足題目要求。
A.en: Correct. Cost allocation tags can help tag resource owners to enable department-level cost tracking. Correct: AWS Budgets allows users to create budgets and set alert thresholds to send notifications when spending reaches a certain percentage. This option fully meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS Cost Explorer 主要用於分析和預測成本，而不是直接標記資源擁有者。 Bug：AWS 成本異常偵測用於偵測異常支出模式，而不是設定預算警報。該選項不符合題目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS Cost Explorer is primarily used for analyzing and predicting costs, rather than directly tagging resource owners. Bug: AWS Cost Anomaly Detection is used to detect abnormal spending patterns, not to set budget alerts. This option does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。成本分配標籤可以幫助標記資源的擁有者。錯誤：AWS Trusted Advisor 和 AWS Support API 主要用於最佳化資源和支援服務，不適合設定預算警報。該選項部分滿足了題目要求，但並不完全正確。
C.en: Incorrect. Cost allocation tags can help mark the owner of a resource. Error: AWS Trusted Advisor and AWS Support API are primarily used for optimizing resources and support services and are not suitable for setting budget alerts. This option partially meets the question requirements, but is not completely correct.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Cost Explorer 主要用於分析和預測成本，而不是直接標記資源擁有者。正確：AWS Budgets 允許使用者建立預算並設定警報閾值。該選項部分滿足了題目要求，但並不完全正確。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS Cost Explorer is primarily used for analyzing and predicting costs, rather than directly tagging resource owners. Correct: AWS Budgets allows users to create budgets and set alert thresholds. This option partially meets the question requirements, but is not completely correct.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 AWS 資源上使用成本分配標籤來標記擁有者。在 AWS 預算中建立使用預算。新增警報閾值，以便在支出超過預算的 60% 時接收通知。
answer_text.en: A. Use cost allocation tags on AWS resources to label owners. Create usage budgets in AWS Budgets. Add an alert threshold to receive notification when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：成本分配標籤可以幫助標記資源擁有者以啟用部門級成本追蹤。正確：AWS Budgets 允許用戶建立預算並設定警報閾值，以便在支出達到一定百分比時發送通知。此選項完全滿足題目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Cost allocation tags can help tag resource owners to enable department-level cost tracking. Correct: AWS Budgets allows users to create budgets and set alert thresholds to send notifications when spending reaches a certain percentage. This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要在 AWS 上部署內部 Web 應用程式。該網路應用程式必須只能從公司辦公室存取。該公司需要從網際網路上下載 Web 應用程式的安全性修補程式。該公司已建立 VPC 並配置了與公司辦公室的 AWS Site-to-Site VPN 連線。解決方案架構師必須為 Web 應用程式設計安全的架構。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to deploy an internal web application on AWS. The web application must be accessible only from the company's office. The company needs to download security patches for the web application from the internet. The company has created a VPC and has configured an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection to the company's office. A solutions architect must design a secure architecture for the web application. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在公用應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面的公用子網路中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署 Web 應用程式。將網際網路閘道連接到 VPC。設定ALB安全群組的入站來源為0.0.0.0/0。
A.en: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets behind a public Application Load Balancer (ALB). Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the inbound source of the ALB's security group to 0.0.0.0/0.

B.zh: 在內部應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面的私有子網路中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署 Web 應用程式。在公有子網路中部署 NAT 閘道。將網際網路閘道連接到 VPC。設定ALB安全群組的入站來源為公司辦公室網路網段。
B.en: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets behind an internal Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy NAT gateways in public subnets. Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the inbound source of the ALB's security group to the company's office network CIDR block.

C.zh: 在內部應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面的公有子網路中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署 Web 應用程式。在私人子網路中部署 NAT 閘道。將 Internet 閘道連接到 VP 將 ALB 安全性群組的出站目的地設定到公司的辦公室網路 CIDR 區塊。
C.en: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets behind an internal Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy NAT gateways in private subnets. Attach an internet gateway to the VPSet the outbound destination of the ALB’s security group to the company's office network CIDR block.

D.zh: 在公用應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面的私有子網路中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署 Web 應用程式。將網際網路閘道連接到 VPC。設定ALB安全組的出方向為0.0.0.0/0。
D.en: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets behind a public Application Load Balancer (ALB). Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the outbound destination of the ALB’s security group to 0.0.0.0/0.

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：將EC2實例部署在公有子網路中，會將實例直接暴露在Internet上，不符合「只能從公司辦公室存取」的要求。 ALB的安全群組入站來源設定為0.0.0.0/0，允許所有來源訪問，進一步違反了安全要求。此選項不符合題目要求，符合。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Deploying the EC2 instance in a public subnet will expose the instance directly to the Internet, which does not meet the requirement of "only accessible from the company office". The ALB's security group inbound source is set to 0.0.0.0/0, allowing access from all sources, further violating security requirements. This option does not meet the question requirements and is.

B.zh: 正確。分析：將EC2執行個體部署在私有子網路中，確保執行個體不會直接暴露在網際網路上，滿足安全需求。使用內部 ALB 可確保負載平衡器只能在內部存取，從而進一步提高安全性。透過NAT網關和Internet網關，私有子網路中的實例可以安全地存取Internet並下載安全性修補程式。 ALB的安全群組入站來源設定為企業辦公室網段，保證只有企業網路可以存取應用程式。此選項完全符合題目要求，正確。
B.en: Correct. Analysis: Deploy the EC2 instance in a private subnet to ensure that the instance is not directly exposed to the Internet and meets security requirements. Using an internal ALB ensures that the load balancer is only accessible internally, further increasing security. Through the NAT gateway and Internet gateway, instances in the private subnet can securely access the Internet to download security patches. The ALB's security group inbound source is set to the CIDR block of the corporate office, ensuring that only the corporate network can access the application. This option fully meets the question requirements and is correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：將EC2實例部署在公有子網路中，會將實例直接暴露在Internet上，不符合「只能從公司辦公室存取」的要求。使用內部ALB是正確的，但將安全群組的出站目標設定為公司辦公網段並不能解決入站存取限制的問題。將NAT網關部署在私有子網路中是錯誤的。它應該部署在公共子網路中。此選項不符合題目要求，符合。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Deploying the EC2 instance in a public subnet will expose the instance directly to the Internet, which does not meet the requirement of "only accessible from the company office". The use of internal ALB is correct, but setting the outbound target of the security group to the CIDR block of the corporate office does not solve the problem of restricting inbound access. It is wrong to deploy the NAT gateway in the private subnet. It should be deployed in the public subnet. This option does not meet the question requirements and is.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：將EC2執行個體部署在私有子網路中是正確的，但使用公用ALB會將負載平衡器暴露到Internet，不符合「只能從公司辦公室存取」的要求。將 ALB 的安全群組出站目標設為 0.0.0.0/0 沒有任何意義，因為出站規則通常用於控制實例對外部資源的訪問，而不是限制對來源的存取。此選項不符合題目要求，符合。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Deploying the EC2 instance in a private subnet is correct, but using a public ALB will expose the load balancer to the Internet and does not meet the "accessible only from the company office" requirement. Setting the ALB's security group outbound target to 0.0.0.0/0 makes no sense because outbound rules are usually used to control instance access to external resources rather than restrict access to sources. This option does not meet the question requirements and is.

answer_text.zh: B. 在內部應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面的私有子網路中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署 Web 應用程式。在公有子網路中部署 NAT 閘道。將網際網路閘道連接到 VPC。設定ALB安全群組的入站來源為公司辦公室網路網段。
answer_text.en: B. Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets behind an internal Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy NAT gateways in public subnets. Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the inbound source of the ALB's security group to the company's office network CIDR block.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：將EC2執行個體部署在私有子網路中，確保執行個體不會直接暴露在網際網路上，滿足安全需求。使用內部 ALB 可確保負載平衡器只能在內部存取，從而進一步提高安全性。透過NAT網關和Internet網關，私有子網路中的實例可以安全地存取Internet並下載安全性修補程式。 ALB的安全群組入站來源設定為企業辦公室網段，保證只有企業網路可以存取應用程式。此選項完全符合題目要求，正確。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Deploy the EC2 instance in a private subnet to ensure that the instance is not directly exposed to the Internet and meets security requirements. Using an internal ALB ensures that the load balancer is only accessible internally, further increasing security. Through the NAT gateway and Internet gateway, instances in the private subnet can securely access the Internet to download security patches. The ALB's security group inbound source is set to the CIDR block of the corporate office, ensuring that only the corporate network can access the application. This option fully meets the question requirements and is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的自訂應用程式中維護其會計記錄。該公司需要將資料遷移到AWS託管服務以開發和維護應用程式資料。此解決方案必須需要最少的操作支持，並提供不可變的、可加密驗證的資料變更日誌。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company maintains its accounting records in a custom application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to migrate the data to an AWS managed service for development and maintenance of the application data. The solution must require minimal operational support and provide immutable, cryptographically verifiable logs of data changes. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 將記錄從應用程式複製到 Amazon Redshift 叢集中。
A.en: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Redshift cluster.

B.zh: 將記錄從應用程式複製到 Amazon Neptune 叢集中。
B.en: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Neptune cluster.

C.zh: 將記錄從應用程式複製到 Amazon Timestream 資料庫中。
C.en: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Timestream database.

D.zh: 將記錄從應用程式複製到 Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) 分類帳。
D.en: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) ledger.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Redshift 是適合分析和查詢大規模資料集的資料倉儲服務。它不提供不可變的、經過加密驗證的日誌記錄功能。因此，該選項不符合題目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon Redshift is a data warehouse service suitable for analyzing and querying large-scale data sets. It does not provide immutable, cryptographically verified logging capabilities. Therefore, this option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Neptune 是一種圖形資料庫服務，適合處理具有複雜關係的圖形資料。它不支援不可變的、經過加密驗證的日誌記錄功能。該選項不符合題目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon Neptune is a graph database service suitable for processing graph data with complex relationships. It does not support immutable, cryptographically verified logging functionality. This option does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Timestream 是適合處理時間序列資料的時間序列資料庫。它不提供不可變的、經過加密驗證的日誌記錄功能。該選項不符合題目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon Timestream is a time series database suitable for processing time series data. It does not provide immutable, cryptographically verified logging capabilities. This option does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 正確。Amazon QLDB 是託管帳本資料庫，專門設計用於提供不可變、經過加密驗證的日誌記錄功能。它完全滿足問題要求，並且需要最少的操作支援。該選項是正確答案。
D.en: Correct. Amazon QLDB is a managed ledger database specifically designed to provide immutable, cryptographically verified logging capabilities. It fully meets the question requirements and requires minimal operational support. This option is the correct answer.

answer_text.zh: D. 將記錄從應用程式複製到 Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) 分類帳。
answer_text.en: D. Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) ledger.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon QLDB 是託管帳本資料庫，專門設計用於提供不可變、經過加密驗證的日誌記錄功能。它完全滿足問題要求，並且需要最少的操作支援。該選項是正確答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon QLDB is a managed ledger database specifically designed to provide immutable, cryptographically verified logging capabilities. It fully meets the question requirements and requires minimal operational support. This option is the correct answer.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司的行銷資料從多個來源上傳到 Amazon S3 儲存桶。一系列資料準備作業匯總資料以進行報告。資料準備作業需要定期並行運行。稍後需要按特定順序運行一些作業。該公司希望消除作業錯誤處理、重試邏輯和狀態管理的營運開銷。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company's marketing data is uploaded from multiple sources to an Amazon S3 bucket. A series of data preparation jobs aggregate the data for reporting. The data preparation jobs need to run at regular intervals in parallel. A few jobs need to run in a specific order later. The company wants to remove the operational overhead of job error handling, retry logic, and state management. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 資料上傳至 S3 儲存桶後，立即使用 AWS Lambda 函數處理資料。定期呼叫其他 Lambda 函數。
A.en: Use an AWS Lambda function to process the data as soon as the data is uploaded to the S3 bucket. Invoke other Lambda functions at regularly scheduled intervals.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon Athena 處理資料。使用 Amazon EventBridge Scheduler 在常規內部呼叫 Athena。
B.en: Use Amazon Athena to process the data. Use Amazon EventBridge Scheduler to invoke Athena on a regular internal.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Glue DataBrew 處理資料。使用 AWS Step Functions 狀態機執行 DataBrew 資料準備作業。
C.en: Use AWS Glue DataBrew to process the data. Use an AWS Step Functions state machine to run the DataBrew data preparation jobs.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Data Pipeline 處理資料。安排資料管道在午夜處理一次資料。
D.en: Use AWS Data Pipeline to process the data. Schedule Data Pipeline to process the data once at midnight.

A.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：雖然AWS Lambda可以處理資料上傳事件並定期呼叫其他函數，但它不具備複雜的狀態管理和工作流程編排功能。需要額外的邏輯來處理錯誤、重試和任務排序。
A.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Although AWS Lambda can handle data upload events and call other functions periodically, it does not have complex state management and workflow orchestration capabilities. Additional logic is required to handle errors, retries, and task sequencing.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：Amazon Athena 是一種互動式查詢服務，適合查詢和分析數據，但不適合複雜的工作流程編排和任務序列管理。 EventBridge Scheduler 僅提供簡單的排程功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Amazon Athena is an interactive query service that is suitable for querying and analyzing data, but is not suitable for complex workflow orchestration and task sequence management. EventBridge Scheduler only provides simple scheduling functionality.

C.zh: 正確。效能分析：AWS Glue DataBrew 專門用於資料準備，AWS Step Functions 提供強大的工作流程編排功能，包括錯誤處理、重試邏輯和任務序列管理。此選項完全滿足題目要求。
C.en: Correct. Performance analysis: AWS Glue DataBrew is specifically used for data preparation, and AWS Step Functions provides powerful workflow orchestration capabilities, including error handling, retry logic, and task sequence management. This option fully meets the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：AWS Data Pipeline 是較舊的服務。雖然可以用於資料處理，但其功能不如AWS Glue和Step Functions強大，且不支援複雜的工作流程編排和即時任務管理。
D.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: AWS Data Pipeline is an older service. Although it can be used for data processing, its functions are not as powerful as AWS Glue and Step Functions, and it does not support complex workflow orchestration and real-time task management.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 AWS Glue DataBrew 處理資料。使用 AWS Step Functions 狀態機執行 DataBrew 資料準備作業。
answer_text.en: C. Use AWS Glue DataBrew to process the data. Use an AWS Step Functions state machine to run the DataBrew data preparation jobs.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能分析：AWS Glue DataBrew 專門用於資料準備，AWS Step Functions 提供強大的工作流程編排功能，包括錯誤處理、重試邏輯和任務序列管理。此選項完全滿足題目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance analysis: AWS Glue DataBrew is specifically used for data preparation, and AWS Step Functions provides powerful workflow orchestration capabilities, including error handling, retry logic, and task sequence management. This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師正在設計一個支付處理應用程序，該應用程式在跨多個可用區的私有子網路中的 AWS Lambda 上運行。該應用程式使用多個 Lambda 函數，每天處理數百萬筆交易。該架構必須確保應用程式不會處理重複支付。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect is designing a payment processing application that runs on AWS Lambda in private subnets across multiple Availability Zones. The application uses multiple Lambda functions and processes millions of transactions each day. The architecture must ensure that the application does not process duplicate payments. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Lambda 檢索所有到期付款。將到期付款發佈到 Amazon S3 儲存桶。使用事件通知配置 S3 儲存桶，以呼叫另一個 Lambda 函數來處理到期付款。
A.en: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Publish the due payments to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the S3 bucket with an event notification to invoke another Lambda function to process the due payments.

B.zh: 使用 Lambda 檢索所有到期付款。將到期付款發佈到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列。設定另一個 Lambda 函數來輪詢 SQS 佇列並處理到期付款。
B.en: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Publish the due payments to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure another Lambda function to poll the SQS queue and to process the due payments.

C.zh: 使用 Lambda 檢索所有到期付款。將到期付款發佈到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 佇列。配置另一個 Lambda 函數來輪詢 FIFO 佇列並處理到期付款。
C.en: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Publish the due payments to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Configure another Lambda function to poll the FIFO queue and to process the due payments.

D.zh: 使用 Lambda 檢索所有到期付款。將到期付款儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 表中。在 DynamoDB 表上設定流以呼叫另一個 Lambda 函數來處理到期付款。
D.en: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Store the due payments in an Amazon DynamoDB table. Configure streams on the DynamoDB table to invoke another Lambda function to process the due payments.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon S3 儲存桶和事件通知：錯誤：Amazon S3 儲存桶沒有重複資料刪除和重複資料刪除功能，以確保付款處理不重複。錯誤：事件通知機制適合觸發簡單的任務，但不適合處理高頻、複雜的事務處理場景。
A.en: Incorrect. Using Amazon S3 buckets and event notifications: Error: Amazon S3 buckets do not have the deduplication and deduplication functions to ensure that payment processing is not repeated. Error: The event notification mechanism is suitable for triggering simple tasks, but is not suitable for handling high-frequency and complex transaction processing scenarios.

B.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon SQS 標準佇列： 錯誤：Amazon SQS 標準佇列無法保證訊息的順利處理，也不能避免訊息的重複處理。錯誤：對於支付處理場景，順查詢和去重是關鍵需求，標準佇列無法滿足這些需求。
B.en: Incorrect. Using the Amazon SQS standard queue: Error: The Amazon SQS standard queue does not guarantee smooth processing of the message, nor can it avoid repeated processing of the message. Error: For payment processing scenarios, cis-query and deduplication are key requirements, and standard queues cannot meet these requirements.

C.zh: 正確。使用 Amazon SQS FIFO 佇列： 正確：Amazon SQS FIFO 佇列確保處理流暢，並提供重複資料刪除功能，適合支付處理場景。正確：Lambda 可以輪詢 FIFO 佇列並處理交易，確保可靠且無重複的付款處理。
C.en: Correct. Using Amazon SQS FIFO queue: Correct: Amazon SQS FIFO queue ensures smooth processing and provides deduplication function, which is suitable for payment processing scenarios. Correct: Lambda can poll the FIFO queue and handle transactions, ensuring reliable and duplication-free payment processing.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon DynamoDB 資料表和流：錯誤：雖然 DynamoDB 流可以觸發 Lambda 函數，但 DynamoDB 本身不具備重複資料刪除和重複資料刪除功能。錯誤：DynamoDB 更適合儲存資料而不是用作佇列。
D.en: Incorrect. Using Amazon DynamoDB tables and streams: Error: Although DynamoDB streams can trigger Lambda functions, DynamoDB itself does not have the deduplication and deduplication capabilities. Wrong: DynamoDB is better suited for storing data rather than being used as a queue.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 Lambda 檢索所有到期付款。將到期付款發佈到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 佇列。配置另一個 Lambda 函數來輪詢 FIFO 佇列並處理到期付款。
answer_text.en: C. Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Publish the due payments to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Configure another Lambda function to poll the FIFO queue and to process the due payments.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (82%)； D (18%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：使用 Amazon SQS FIFO 佇列： 正確：Amazon SQS FIFO 佇列確保處理流暢，並提供重複資料刪除功能，適合支付處理場景。正確：Lambda 可以輪詢 FIFO 佇列並處理交易，確保可靠且無重複的付款處理。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (82%); D (18%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Using Amazon SQS FIFO queue: Correct: Amazon SQS FIFO queue ensures smooth processing and provides deduplication function, which is suitable for payment processing scenarios. Correct: Lambda can poll the FIFO queue and handle transactions, ensuring reliable and duplication-free payment processing.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在其本地資料中心運行多個工作負載。該公司的資料中心擴展速度不夠快，無法滿足公司不斷擴大的業務需求。該公司希望收集有關本地伺服器和工作負載的使用情況和配置數據，以規劃向 AWS 的遷移。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs multiple workloads in its on-premises data center. The company's data center cannot scale fast enough to meet the company's expanding business needs. The company wants to collect usage and configuration data about the on-premises servers and workloads to plan a migration to AWS. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在 AWS Migration Hub 中設定主 AWS 區域。使用 AWS Systems Manager 收集有關本機伺服器的資料。
A.en: Set the home AWS Region in AWS Migration Hub. Use AWS Systems Manager to collect data about the on-premises servers.

B.zh: 在 AWS Migration Hub 中設定主 AWS 區域。使用 AWS Application Discovery Service 收集有關本地伺服器的資料。
B.en: Set the home AWS Region in AWS Migration Hub. Use AWS Application Discovery Service to collect data about the on- premises servers.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) 建立相關範本。使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 收集有關本機伺服器的資料。
C.en: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to create the relevant templates. Use AWS Trusted Advisor to collect data about the on-premises servers.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) 建立相關範本。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 收集有關本機伺服器的資料。
D.en: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to create the relevant templates. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to collect data about the on-premises servers.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Systems Manager 主要用於管理和操作伺服器（例如執行命令、修補程式管理等），並非專門用於收集與遷移相關的使用情況和設定資料。雖然可以透過 Systems Manager 的某些功能收集某些數據，但它並不是規劃遷移的最佳工具。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS Systems Manager is primarily used to manage and operate servers (such as running commands, patch management, etc.) and is not specifically used to collect migration-related usage and configuration data. While some data can be collected through some of Systems Manager's features, it is not the best tool for planning a migration.

B.zh: 正確。AWS Application Discovery Service 是一項專門設計用於收集本機伺服器和工作負載的使用情況和設定資料的服務。它與AWS Migration Hub集成，可以幫助使用者規劃遷移到AWS的流程。
B.en: Correct. The AWS Application Discovery Service is a service specifically designed to collect usage and configuration data for local servers and workloads. It is integrated with AWS Migration Hub and can help users plan the process of migrating to AWS.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) 主要用於資料庫遷移的架構轉換，與收集伺服器使用情況和設定資料無關。 AWS Trusted Advisor 是一種最佳化工具，用於檢查 AWS 帳戶的最佳實踐，而不是收集本機伺服器資料。
C.en: Incorrect. AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) is mainly used for schema conversion for database migration and has nothing to do with collecting server usage and configuration data. AWS Trusted Advisor is an optimization tool used to check best practices for AWS accounts rather than collecting local server data.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 主要用於遷移資料庫，不用於收集本機伺服器的使用情況和設定資料。 AWS SCT和AWS DMS都與資料庫遷移相關，與該問題所需的伺服器資料收集不符。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) is primarily used to migrate databases and is not used to collect usage and configuration data of local servers. AWS SCT and AWS DMS are both related to database migration and do not match the server data collection required by this question.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 AWS Migration Hub 中設定主 AWS 區域。使用 AWS Application Discovery Service 收集有關本地伺服器的資料。
answer_text.en: B. Set the home AWS Region in AWS Migration Hub. Use AWS Application Discovery Service to collect data about the on- premises servers.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Application Discovery Service 是一項專門設計用於收集本機伺服器和工作負載的使用情況和設定資料的服務。它與AWS Migration Hub集成，可以幫助使用者規劃遷移到AWS的流程。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The AWS Application Discovery Service is a service specifically designed to collect usage and configuration data for local servers and workloads. It is integrated with AWS Migration Hub and can help users plan the process of migrating to AWS.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS Organizations 中擁有一個已啟用所有功能的組織。該公司要求任何現有或新 AWS 帳戶中的所有 API 呼叫和登入都必須經過審核。該公司需要一個託管解決方案來防止額外的工作並最大限度地降低成本。本公司還需要了解任何 AWS 帳戶何時不符合 AWS 基礎安全最佳實務 (FSBP) 標準。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The company requires that all API calls and logins in any existing or new AWS account must be audited. The company needs a managed solution to prevent additional work and to minimize costs. The company also needs to know when any AWS account is not compliant with the AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP) standard. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 在組織管理帳戶中部署 AWS Control Tower 環境。在環境中啟用 AWS Security Hub 和 AWS Control Tower 帳戶工廠。
A.en: Deploy an AWS Control Tower environment in the Organizations management account. Enable AWS Security Hub and AWS Control Tower Account Factory in the environment.

B.zh: 在專用組織成員帳戶中部署 AWS Control Tower 環境。在環境中啟用 AWS Security Hub 和 AWS Control Tower 帳戶工廠。
B.en: Deploy an AWS Control Tower environment in a dedicated Organizations member account. Enable AWS Security Hub and AWS Control Tower Account Factory in the environment.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate 建立多帳戶登陸區域 (MALZ)。在 MALZ 中提交 RFC 以自助配置 Amazon GuardDuty。
C.en: Use AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate to build a multi-account landing zone (MALZ). Submit an RFC to self-service provision Amazon GuardDuty in the MALZ.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate 建置多帳戶登陸區 (MALZ)。在 MALZ 中提交 RFC 以自助配置 AWS Security Hub。
D.en: Use AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate to build a multi-account landing zone (MALZ). Submit an RFC to self-service provision AWS Security Hub in the MALZ.

A.zh: 正確。AWS Control Tower 是一項託管服務，可協助公司快速設定和管理多帳戶環境，同時提供合規性檢查和日誌審核功能。正確：在組織管理帳戶中部署 AWS Control Tower 可以集中管理所有帳戶並減少營運開銷。正確：啟用 AWS Security Hub 自動檢查是否符合 AWS 基礎安全最佳實務 (FSBP) 標準。
A.en: Correct. AWS Control Tower is a managed service that helps companies quickly set up and manage multi-account environments while providing compliance checks and log auditing capabilities. Correct: Deploying AWS Control Tower in the Organizations management account can centrally manage all accounts and reduce operational overhead. Correct: Enable AWS Security Hub to automatically check compliance with AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP) standards.

B.zh: 錯誤。在專用成員帳戶中部署 AWS Control Tower 會增加管理複雜性，因為管理帳戶通常是集中管理的最佳選擇。錯誤：這種方法不符合「最小化營運開銷」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Deploying AWS Control Tower in a dedicated member account increases management complexity, as administrative accounts are often the best choice for centralized management. Error: This approach does not meet the requirement of "minimizing operational overhead".

C.zh: 錯誤。儘管 Amazon GuardDuty 可以提供威脅偵測，但它不會直接檢查是否符合 AWS 基礎安全最佳實務 (FSBP) 標準。錯誤：使用AMS Accelerate會增加成本和營運開銷，不符合「最小化成本和營運開銷」的問題要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Although Amazon GuardDuty can provide threat detection, it does not directly check compliance with AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP) standards. Error: Using AMS Accelerate will increase costs and operating overhead, which does not meet the question requirement of "minimizing costs and operating overhead.".

D.zh: 錯誤。雖然 AWS Security Hub 可以檢查是否符合 FSBP 標準，但使用 AMS Accelerate 會增加成本和營運開銷。錯誤：AMS Accelerate 的複雜性和成本不滿足問題的「最小化成本和營運開銷」要求。
D.en: Incorrect. While AWS Security Hub can check compliance with FSBP standards, using AMS Accelerate adds cost and operational overhead. Error: The complexity and cost of AMS Accelerate do not meet the "minimize cost and operational overhead" requirement of the question.

answer_text.zh: A. 在組織管理帳戶中部署 AWS Control Tower 環境。在環境中啟用 AWS Security Hub 和 AWS Control Tower 帳戶工廠。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy an AWS Control Tower environment in the Organizations management account. Enable AWS Security Hub and AWS Control Tower Account Factory in the environment.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Control Tower 是一項託管服務，可協助公司快速設定和管理多帳戶環境，同時提供合規性檢查和日誌審核功能。正確：在組織管理帳戶中部署 AWS Control Tower 可以集中管理所有帳戶並減少營運開銷。正確：啟用 AWS Security Hub 自動檢查是否符合 AWS 基礎安全最佳實務 (FSBP) 標準。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Control Tower is a managed service that helps companies quickly set up and manage multi-account environments while providing compliance checks and log auditing capabilities. Correct: Deploying AWS Control Tower in the Organizations management account can centrally manage all accounts and reduce operational overhead. Correct: Enable AWS Security Hub to automatically check compliance with AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP) standards.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中以 Apache Parquet 格式儲存了 10 TB 的日誌檔案。公司偶爾需要使用SQL來分析日誌檔。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has stored 10 TB of log files in Apache Parquet format in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company occasionally needs to use SQL to analyze the log files. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 建立 Amazon Aurora MySQL 資料庫。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 將資料從 S3 儲存桶遷移到 Aurora。向 Aurora 資料庫發出 SQL 語句。
A.en: Create an Amazon Aurora MySQL database. Migrate the data from the S3 bucket into Aurora by using AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS). Issue SQL statements to the Aurora database.

B.zh: 建立 Amazon Redshift 叢集。使用 Redshift Spectrum 直接對 S3 儲存桶中的資料執行 SQL 語句。
B.en: Create an Amazon Redshift cluster. Use Redshift Spectrum to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket.

C.zh: 建立 AWS Glue 爬網程式以儲存 S3 儲存桶中的表元資料並從中擷取表元資料。使用 Amazon Athena 直接對 S3 儲存桶中的資料執行 SQL 語句。
C.en: Create an AWS Glue crawler to store and retrieve table metadata from the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket.

D.zh: 建立 Amazon EMR 叢集。使用 Apache Spark SQL 直接對 S3 儲存桶中的資料執行 SQL 語句。
D.en: Create an Amazon EMR cluster. Use Apache Spark SQL to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket.

A.zh: 錯誤。Aurora MySQL 是一種結構化資料庫服務，適用於結構化資料儲存和高效能事務處理。將 10 TB 的日誌檔案遷移到 Aurora 既耗時又昂貴，也不適合偶爾的 SQL 分析需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Aurora MySQL is a structured database service suitable for structured data storage and high-performance transaction processing. Migrating 10 TB of log files to Aurora would be time-consuming and expensive, and not suitable for occasional SQL analysis needs.

B.zh: 錯誤。部分正確：Redshift Spectrum 可以直接查詢儲存在 S3 中的數據，但創建和維護 Redshift 叢集的成本很高，特別是對於偶爾的查詢需求。該解決方案的成本效益不如 Athena。
B.en: Incorrect. Partially correct: Redshift Spectrum can directly query data stored in S3, but the cost of creating and maintaining a Redshift cluster is high, especially for occasional query needs. This solution is not as cost-effective as Athena.

C.zh: 正確。AWS Glue 爬網程式可以自動產生表元數據，Amazon Athena 可以直接查詢儲存在 S3 中的數據，而無需額外的儲存或運算資源。此選項成本最低，最適合偶爾的 SQL 分析需求。
C.en: Correct. AWS Glue crawler can automatically generate table metadata, and Amazon Athena can directly query data stored in S3 without requiring additional storage or computing resources. This option is the lowest cost and best suited for occasional SQL analysis needs.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EMR 適用於大規模資料處理和複雜分析任務，但對於偶爾的 SQL 查詢需求，EMR 的設定和運行成本較高，並且不如 Athena 經濟高效。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon EMR is suitable for large-scale data processing and complex analysis tasks, but for occasional SQL query requirements, EMR is more expensive to set up and run, and is not as economical and efficient as Athena.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立 AWS Glue 爬網程式以儲存 S3 儲存桶中的表元資料並從中擷取表元資料。使用 Amazon Athena 直接對 S3 儲存桶中的資料執行 SQL 語句。
answer_text.en: C. Create an AWS Glue crawler to store and retrieve table metadata from the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Glue 爬網程式可以自動產生表元數據，Amazon Athena 可以直接查詢儲存在 S3 中的數據，而無需額外的儲存或運算資源。此選項成本最低，最適合偶爾的 SQL 分析需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Glue crawler can automatically generate table metadata, and Amazon Athena can directly query data stored in S3 without requiring additional storage or computing resources. This option is the lowest cost and best suited for occasional SQL analysis needs.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司需要一種解決方案來防止 AWS CloudFormation 堆疊部署在語句中包含內聯策略或「*」的 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 資源。此解決方案還必須禁止使用公用 IP 位址部署 Amazon EC2 執行個體。該公司在 AWS Organizations 的組織中啟用了 AWS Control Tower。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs a solution to prevent AWS CloudFormation stacks from deploying AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) resources that include an inline policy or “*” in the statement. The solution must also prohibit deployment of Amazon EC2 instances with public IP addresses. The company has AWS Control Tower enabled in its organization in AWS Organizations. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Control Tower 主動控制來阻止部署具有公用 IP 位址和具有提升存取權限或「*」的內聯原則的 EC2 執行個體。
A.en: Use AWS Control Tower proactive controls to block deployment of EC2 instances with public IP addresses and inline policies with elevated access or “*”.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Control Tower 偵測控制項可阻止部署具有公有 IP 位址和具有提升存取權限或「*」的內嵌原則的 EC2 執行個體。
B.en: Use AWS Control Tower detective controls to block deployment of EC2 instances with public IP addresses and inline policies with elevated access or “*”.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Config 建立 EC2 和 IAM 合規性規則。配置規則以執行 AWS Systems Manager 會話管理器自動化，以在資源不合規時刪除該資源。
C.en: Use AWS Config to create rules for EC2 and IAM compliance. Configure the rules to run an AWS Systems Manager Session Manager automation to delete a resource when it is not compliant.

D.zh: 如果 EC2 執行個體和 IAM 資源的操作導致不合規，請使用服務控制策略 (SCP) 封鎖這些操作。
D.en: Use a service control policy (SCP) to block actions for the EC2 instances and IAM resources if the actions lead to noncompliance.

A.zh: 正確。AWS Control Tower 的主動控制可以在建立資源之前阻止資源，這滿足了問題的要求。主動控制可以直接阻止不合規資源的部署，例如具有公用 IP 位址的 EC2 執行個體或包含「*」的 IAM 原則。
A.en: Correct. AWS Control Tower's Proactive Controls can block resources before they are created, which meets the requirements of the question. Proactive controls can directly block the deployment of non-compliant resources, such as EC2 instances with public IP addresses or IAM policies containing "*".

B.zh: 錯誤。Detective Controls 會在事後偵測資源是否符合要求，而不是在建立資源之前阻止部署。題目要求的是防止資源部署，而不是事後偵測，所以不符合要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Detective Controls detect whether resources meet requirements after the fact, rather than preventing deployment before resources are created. The question requires preventing resource deployment, not post-detection, so it does not meet the requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Config 可以偵測資源是否符合規則，但無法直接阻止資源的建立。雖然可以透過自動化刪除不合規的資源，但這並不是防止資源部署的最佳實務。
C.en: Incorrect. AWS Config can detect whether resources comply with rules, but it cannot directly prevent the creation of resources. While it is possible to remove non-compliant resources through automation, this is not a best practice for preventing resource deployment.

D.zh: 錯誤。SCP 可以限制帳戶內的操作，但無法細粒度地阻止建立特定資源（例如具有公用 IP 位址的 EC2 執行個體或包含「*」的 IAM 原則）。問題所要求的功能較適合使用AWS Control Tower的主動控制。
D.en: Incorrect. SCP can restrict operations within an account, but cannot fine-grainedly prevent the creation of specific resources (such as EC2 instances with public IP addresses or IAM policies containing "*"). The function requested by the question is more suitable to use the active control of AWS Control Tower.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Control Tower 主動控制來阻止部署具有公用 IP 位址和具有提升存取權限或「*」的內聯原則的 EC2 執行個體。
answer_text.en: A. Use AWS Control Tower proactive controls to block deployment of EC2 instances with public IP addresses and inline policies with elevated access or “*”.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (70%)； D (30%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Control Tower 的主動控制可以在建立資源之前阻止資源，這滿足了問題的要求。主動控制可以直接阻止不合規資源的部署，例如具有公用 IP 位址的 EC2 執行個體或包含「*」的 IAM 原則。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (70%); D (30%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Control Tower's Proactive Controls can block resources before they are created, which meets the requirements of the question. Proactive controls can directly block the deployment of non-compliant resources, such as EC2 instances with public IP addresses or IAM policies containing "*".

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 雲端中託管的 Web 應用程式最近越來越受歡迎。此 Web 應用程式目前存在於單一公有子網路中的單一 Amazon EC2 執行個體上。 Web應用程式已經無法滿足網路流量增加的需求。該公司需要一種能夠提供高可用性和可擴展性的解決方案，以滿足不斷增長的用戶需求，而無需重寫 Web 應用程式。哪一種步驟組合可以滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company's web application that is hosted in the AWS Cloud recently increased in popularity. The web application currently exists on a single Amazon EC2 instance in a single public subnet. The web application has not been able to meet the demand of the increased web traffic. The company needs a solution that will provide high availability and scalability to meet the increased user demand without rewriting the web application. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 將 EC2 執行個體替換為更大的運算最佳化執行個體。
A.en: Replace the EC2 instance with a larger compute optimized instance.

B.zh: 在私有子網路中設定 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 多個可用區。
B.en: Configure Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling with multiple Availability Zones in private subnets.

C.zh: 在公用子網路中設定 NAT 閘道以處理 Web 要求。
C.en: Configure a NAT gateway in a public subnet to handle web requests.

D.zh: 將 EC2 執行個體替換為更大的記憶體最佳化執行個體。
D.en: Replace the EC2 instance with a larger memory optimized instance.

E.zh: 在公有子網路中設定應用程式負載平衡器以指派 Web 流量。
E.en: Configure an Application Load Balancer in a public subnet to distribute web traffic.

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然切換到運算最佳化實例可能會提高單一實例的效能，但並不能解決高可用性和可擴展性的問題。無條件選項足以確保高可用性和可擴充性。
A.en: Incorrect. Although switching to compute-optimized instances may improve the performance of a single instance, it does not solve the problems of high availability and scalability. The unconditional options are sufficient to ensure high availability and scalability.

B.zh: 正確。EC2 Auto Scaling 可根據流量需求調整執行個體數量，並透過跨多個可用區部署來實現高可用性。這些選項包括高可用性和可擴展性。
B.en: Correct. EC2 Auto Scaling can adjust the number of instances based on traffic demand and achieve high availability by deploying across multiple availability zones. The options include high availability and scalability.

C.zh: 錯誤。NAT 閘道用於允許私有子網路中的資源存取 Internet，而不是處理外部 Web 要求。此選項與題目要求無關。
C.en: Incorrect. A NAT gateway is used to allow resources in a private subnet to access the Internet, rather than handling external web requests. this option have nothing to do with the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。替換為內部最佳化的實例可能會提高單一實例的效能，但並不能解決高可用性和可擴展性的問題。無條件選項足以確保高可用性和可擴充性。
D.en: Incorrect. Replacing with internally optimized instances may improve the performance of a single instance, but it does not solve the problems of high availability and scalability. The unconditional options are sufficient to ensure high availability and scalability.

E.zh: 正確。應用程式負載平衡器可以將流量分配到多個實例，以實現高可用性和可擴展性。這些選項包括高可用性和可擴展性。
E.en: Correct. Application Load Balancer can distribute traffic to multiple instances to achieve high availability and scalability. The options include high availability and scalability.

answer_text.zh: B. 在私有子網路中設定 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 多個可用區。；E. 在公有子網路中設定應用程式負載平衡器以指派 Web 流量。
answer_text.en: B. Configure Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling with multiple Availability Zones in private subnets.; E. Configure an Application Load Balancer in a public subnet to distribute web traffic.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BE (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：EC2 Auto Scaling 可根據流量需求調整執行個體數量，並透過跨多個可用區部署來實現高可用性。這些選項包括高可用性和可擴展性。；應用程式負載平衡器可以將流量分配到多個實例，以實現高可用性和可擴展性。這些選項包括高可用性和可擴展性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: EC2 Auto Scaling can adjust the number of instances based on traffic demand and achieve high availability by deploying across multiple availability zones. The options include high availability and scalability.; Application Load Balancer can distribute traffic to multiple instances to achieve high availability and scalability. The options include high availability and scalability.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有使用環境變數的 AWS Lambda 函數。該公司不希望其開發人員看到明文的環境變數。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has AWS Lambda functions that use environment variables. The company does not want its developers to see environment variables in plaintext. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將程式碼部署到 Amazon EC2 實例，而不是使用 Lambda 函數。
A.en: Deploy code to Amazon EC2 instances instead of using Lambda functions.

B.zh: 在 Lambda 函數上設定 SSL 加密以使用 AWS CloudHSM 儲存和加密環境變數。
B.en: Configure SSL encryption on the Lambda functions to use AWS CloudHSM to store and encrypt the environment variables.

C.zh: 在 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 中建立憑證。配置 Lambda 函數以使用憑證加密環境變數。
C.en: Create a certificate in AWS Certificate Manager (ACM). Configure the Lambda functions to use the certificate to encrypt the environment variables.

D.zh: 建立 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰。在 Lambda 函數上啟用加密幫助程式以使用 KMS 金鑰來儲存和加密環境變數。
D.en: Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key. Enable encryption helpers on the Lambda functions to use the KMS key to store and encrypt the environment variables.

A.zh: 錯誤。將程式碼部署到EC2實例並不能解決環境變數的加密問題。 EC2執行個體的環境變數仍需要額外的加密和保護措施。另外，這種方法會增加管理複雜度，與問題的要求不符。
A.en: Incorrect. Deploying code to an EC2 instance does not solve the encryption problem of environment variables. Environment variables for EC2 instances still require additional encryption and protection measures. In addition, this method will increase management complexity and is inconsistent with the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然 AWS CloudHSM 可用於加密，但它不是 Lambda 環境變數加密的建議解決方案。 SSL加密主要用於傳輸層安全，與環境變數的儲存加密無關。
B.en: Incorrect. Although AWS CloudHSM can be used for encryption, it is not the recommended solution for Lambda environment variable encryption. SSL encryption is mainly used for transport layer security and has nothing to do with storage encryption of environment variables.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 主要用於管理 SSL/TLS 憑證和保護網絡，而不是加密 Lambda 環境變數。 ACM 不能直接用於儲存或加密環境變數。
C.en: Incorrect. AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) is mainly used to manage SSL/TLS certificates and protect the network, rather than encrypting Lambda environment variables. ACM cannot be used directly to store or encrypt environment variables.

D.zh: 正確。AWS KMS 是一項專為加密和加密管理而設計的服務。 Lambda 支援使用 KMS 加密來加密環境變數。透過啟用加密助手，開發者可以確保環境變數在儲存和使用時是加密的，從而滿足問題要求。
D.en: Correct. AWS KMS is a service specifically designed for encryption and management of encryption. Lambda supports using KMS encryption to encrypt environment variables. With enabling the encryption assistant, developers can ensure that environment variables are encrypted when stored and used, thereby meeting the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: D. 建立 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰。在 Lambda 函數上啟用加密幫助程式以使用 KMS 金鑰來儲存和加密環境變數。
answer_text.en: D. Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key. Enable encryption helpers on the Lambda functions to use the KMS key to store and encrypt the environment variables.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS KMS 是一項專為加密和加密管理而設計的服務。 Lambda 支援使用 KMS 加密來加密環境變數。透過啟用加密助手，開發者可以確保環境變數在儲存和使用時是加密的，從而滿足問題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS KMS is a service specifically designed for encryption and management of encryption. Lambda supports using KMS encryption to encrypt environment variables. With enabling the encryption assistant, developers can ensure that environment variables are encrypted when stored and used, thereby meeting the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家分析公司使用 Amazon VPC 來運作其多層服務。該公司希望使用 RESTful API 為數百萬用戶提供 Web 分析服務。使用者必須使用身份驗證服務進行驗證才能存取 API。哪種解決方案能夠以最高的營運效率滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: An analytics company uses Amazon VPC to run its multi-tier services. The company wants to use RESTful APIs to offer a web analytics service to millions of users. Users must be verified by using an authentication service to access the APIs. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

A.zh: 設定 Amazon Cognito 使用者池以進行使用者驗證。使用 Cognito 授權者實作 Amazon API Gateway REST API。
A.en: Configure an Amazon Cognito user pool for user authentication. Implement Amazon API Gateway REST APIs with a Cognito authorizer.

B.zh: 設定 Amazon Cognito 身分池以進行使用者驗證。使用 Cognito 授權者實作 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API。
B.en: Configure an Amazon Cognito identity pool for user authentication. Implement Amazon API Gateway HTTP APIs with a Cognito authorizer.

C.zh: 設定 AWS Lambda 函數來處理使用者驗證。使用 Lambda 授權者實作 Amazon API Gateway REST API。
C.en: Configure an AWS Lambda function to handle user authentication. Implement Amazon API Gateway REST APIs with a Lambda authorizer.

D.zh: 設定 IAM 使用者來處理使用者驗證。使用 IAM 授權者實作 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API。
D.en: Configure an IAM user to handle user authentication. Implement Amazon API Gateway HTTP APIs with an IAM authorizer.

A.zh: 正確。效能分析：Amazon Cognito用戶池專門用於用戶身份驗證，可有效管理用戶註冊、登入和身份驗證。 API Gateway REST API支援Cognito授權方，可直接整合使用者池進行認證，簡化操作，提高效率。
A.en: Correct. Performance analysis: Amazon Cognito user pool is specifically used for user authentication and can efficiently manage user registration, login, and authentication. API Gateway REST API supports Cognito authorizer and can directly integrate user pools for authentication, simplifying operations and improving efficiency.

B.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：Amazon Cognito身分池主要用於暫時存取AWS資源，而非直接用於使用者驗證。 HTTP API 支援 Cognito 授權方，但 REST API 更適合複雜的 API 場景。
B.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Amazon Cognito identity pool is mainly used for temporary access to AWS resources, not directly for user authentication. HTTP API supports Cognito authorizer, but REST API is more suitable for complex API scenarios.

C.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：使用Lambda函數進行使用者認證是可行的，但需要額外的開發和維護工作，增加了操作複雜度。相比之下，Cognito用戶池提供了更高的運作效率。
C.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Using Lambda functions for user authentication is feasible, but requires additional development and maintenance work, increasing operational complexity. In comparison, Cognito user pool provides higher operational efficiency.

D.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：IAM使用者不適合大規模使用者認證場景，IAM授權者主要用於AWS服務之間的存取控制，而不是用於外部使用者的認證。
D.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: IAM users are not suitable for large-scale user authentication scenarios, and the IAM authorizer is mainly used for access control between AWS services, rather than for authentication of external users.

answer_text.zh: A. 設定 Amazon Cognito 使用者池以進行使用者驗證。使用 Cognito 授權者實作 Amazon API Gateway REST API。
answer_text.en: A. Configure an Amazon Cognito user pool for user authentication. Implement Amazon API Gateway REST APIs with a Cognito authorizer.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (89%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能分析：Amazon Cognito用戶池專門用於用戶身份驗證，可有效管理用戶註冊、登入和身份驗證。 API Gateway REST API支援Cognito授權方，可直接整合使用者池進行認證，簡化操作，提高效率。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (89%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance analysis: Amazon Cognito user pool is specifically used for user authentication and can efficiently manage user registration, login, and authentication. API Gateway REST API supports Cognito authorizer and can directly integrate user pools for authentication, simplifying operations and improving efficiency.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一款供客戶使用的行動應用程式。該應用程式的資料很敏感，必須靜態加密。該公司使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS)。該公司需要一種解決方案來防止 KMS 金鑰被意外刪除。當使用者嘗試刪除 KMS 金鑰時，此解決方案必須使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 向管理員發送電子郵件通知。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has a mobile app for customers. The app’s data is sensitive and must be encrypted at rest. The company uses AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). The company needs a solution that prevents the accidental deletion of KMS keys. The solution must use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to send an email notification to administrators when a user attempts to delete a KMS key. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 建立一個 Amazon EventBridge 規則，該規則在使用者嘗試刪除 KMS 金鑰時做出反應。配置取消任何 KMS 金鑰刪除操作的 AWS Config 規則。新增 AWS Config 規則作為 EventBridge 規則的目標。建立通知管理員的 SNS 主題。
A.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts when a user tries to delete a KMS key. Configure an AWS Config rule that cancels any deletion of a KMS key. Add the AWS Config rule as a target of the EventBridge rule. Create an SNS topic that notifies the administrators.

B.zh: 建立一個具有自訂邏輯的 AWS Lambda 函數以防止 KMS 金鑰刪除。建立一個 Amazon CloudWatch 警報，該警報在使用者嘗試刪除 KMS 金鑰時啟動。建立一個 Amazon EventBridge 規則，該規則在執行 DeleteKey 操作時呼叫 Lambda 函數。建立 SNS 主題。配置 EventBridge 規則以發布通知管理員的 SNS 訊息。
B.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that has custom logic to prevent KMS key deletion. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm that is activated when a user tries to delete a KMS key. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes the Lambda function when the DeleteKey operation is performed. Create an SNS topic. Configure the EventBridge rule to publish an SNS message that notifies the administrators.

C.zh: 建立一個 Amazon EventBridge 規則，該規則在執行 KMS DeleteKey 操作時做出反應。配置規則以啟動 AWS Systems Manager Automation Runbook。配置 Runbook 以取消刪除 KMS 金鑰。建立 SNS 主題。配置 EventBridge 規則以發布通知管理員的 SNS 訊息。
C.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts when the KMS DeleteKey operation is performed. Configure the rule to initiate an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Configure the runbook to cancel the deletion of the KMS key. Create an SNS topic. Configure the EventBridge rule to publish an SNS message that notifies the administrators.

D.zh: 建立 AWS CloudTrail 追蹤。配置追蹤以將日誌傳送到新的 Amazon CloudWatch 日誌組。根據 CloudWatch 日誌組的指標過濾器建立 CloudWatch 警報。配置警報以在執行 KMS DeleteKey 操作時使用 Amazon SNS 通知管理員。
D.en: Create an AWS CloudTrail trail. Configure the trail to deliver logs to a new Amazon CloudWatch log group. Create a CloudWatch alarm based on the metric filter for the CloudWatch log group. Configure the alarm to use Amazon SNS to notify the administrators when the KMS DeleteKey operation is performed.

A.zh: 錯誤。原因：雖然EventBridge可以擷取事件，但AWS Config規則無法直接取消KMS金鑰的刪除。該選項的邏輯比較複雜，並且沒有明確提到如何防止key被刪除。
A.en: Incorrect. Reason: Although EventBridge can capture events, AWS Config rules cannot directly cancel the deletion of the KMS key. The logic of this option is relatively complex, and it does not clearly mention how to prevent key deletion.

B.zh: 錯誤。原因：由於需要編寫和維護自訂邏輯，使用 Lambda 函數會增加額外的操作開銷。此選項沒有提及如何取消金鑰刪除操作，僅透過SNS通知管理員。
B.en: Incorrect. Reason: Using Lambda functions adds additional operational overhead because of the need to write and maintain custom logic. This option does not mention how to cancel the key deletion operation and only notifies the administrator via SNS.

C.zh: 正確。原因：EventBridge可以捕捉DeleteKey操作事件。透過 AWS Systems Manager Automation 執行註冊表會自動取消金鑰刪除操作。使用SNS通知管理員，滿足通知需求。此選項設計簡單，運行開銷最低，並且滿足問題的要求。
C.en: Correct. Reason: EventBridge can capture DeleteKey operation events. Running the registry through AWS Systems Manager Automation automatically cancels the key deletion operation. Use SNS to notify administrators to meet notification needs. This option is simple in design, has the lowest operating overhead, and meets the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。原因：CloudTrail 可以記住DeleteKey 操作，但無法直接封鎖金鑰刪除。需要對CloudWatch組和警報進行額外配置，這會使操作變得複雜。此選項沒有提及如何取消金鑰刪除操作，僅透過SNS通知管理員。
D.en: Incorrect. Cause: CloudTrail can remember DeleteKey operations, but cannot directly prevent key deletion. Additional configuration of CloudWatch groups and alarms is required, which complicates the operation. This option does not mention how to cancel the key deletion operation and only notifies the administrator via SNS.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立一個 Amazon EventBridge 規則，該規則在執行 KMS DeleteKey 操作時做出反應。配置規則以啟動 AWS Systems Manager Automation Runbook。配置 Runbook 以取消刪除 KMS 金鑰。建立 SNS 主題。配置 EventBridge 規則以發布通知管理員的 SNS 訊息。
answer_text.en: C. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts when the KMS DeleteKey operation is performed. Configure the rule to initiate an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook. Configure the runbook to cancel the deletion of the KMS key. Create an SNS topic. Configure the EventBridge rule to publish an SNS message that notifies the administrators.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (86%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：原因：EventBridge可以捕捉DeleteKey操作事件。透過 AWS Systems Manager Automation 執行註冊表會自動取消金鑰刪除操作。使用SNS通知管理員，滿足通知需求。此選項設計簡單，運行開銷最低，並且滿足問題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (86%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Reason: EventBridge can capture DeleteKey operation events. Running the registry through AWS Systems Manager Automation automatically cancels the key deletion operation. Use SNS to notify administrators to meet notification needs. This option is simple in design, has the lowest operating overhead, and meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望分析並產生報告以追蹤其行動應用程式的使用情況。該應用程式很受歡迎，擁有全球用戶群。該公司使用自訂報告建立程式來分析應用程式使用情況。該程式在每個月的最後一周產生多份報告。該程式只需不到 10 分鐘即可產生每份報告。該公司很少在每月最後一周之外使用該程式產生報告。該公司希望在請求報告時在最短的時間內產生報告。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to analyze and generate reports to track the usage of its mobile app. The app is popular and has a global user base. The company uses a custom report building program to analyze application usage. The program generates multiple reports during the last week of each month. The program takes less than 10 minutes to produce each report. The company rarely uses the program to generate reports outside of the last week of each month The company wants to generate reports in the least amount of time when the reports are requested. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 隨選執行個體執行程式。建立 Amazon EventBridge 規則以在要求報告時啟動 EC2 執行個體。在每個月的最後一周連續運行 EC2 執行個體。
A.en: Run the program by using Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to start the EC2 instances when reports are requested. Run the EC2 instances continuously during the last week of each month.

B.zh: 在 AWS Lambda 中執行該程式。建立 Amazon EventBridge 規則以在請求報告時執行 Lambda 函數。
B.en: Run the program in AWS Lambda. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to run a Lambda function when reports are requested.

C.zh: 在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 中執行程式。安排 Amazon ECS 在請求報告時執行該程式。
C.en: Run the program in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Schedule Amazon ECS to run the program when reports are requested.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 Spot 執行個體執行程式。建立 Amazon EventBndge 規則以在要求報告時啟動 EC2 執行個體。在每個月的最後一周連續運行 EC2 執行個體。
D.en: Run the program by using Amazon EC2 Spot Instances. Create an Amazon EventBndge rule to start the EC2 instances when reports are requested. Run the EC2 instances continuously during the last week of each month.

A.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：EC2按需實例按需求計費，適合靈活的規劃需求，但運行一周實例會產生較高的成本，特別是程式只需要運行不到10分鐘。錯誤原因：性價比不高，因為EC2執行個體會連續運作一周，程式實際運作時間很長。
A.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: EC2 On-Demand Instances are billed on demand, which is suitable for flexible planning needs, but running the instance for a whole week will incur higher costs, especially since the program only needs to run for less than 10 minutes. Reason for the error: The cost-effectiveness is not high because the EC2 instance will run continuously for a week, and the actual running time of the program is very long.

B.zh: 正確。效能分析：AWS Lambda是一種無伺服器計費服務，按使用時間計費，非常適合耗時的任務。結合EventBridge可以實現事件驅動的自動觸發。 Lambda函數只在需要的時候運行，而且運行時間很小（不到10分鐘），因此成本最小。
B.en: Correct. Performance analysis: AWS Lambda is a serverless billing service that is billed by usage time and is very suitable for time-consuming tasks. The combination of EventBridge can realize event-driven automated triggering. The Lambda function only runs when needed, and the running time is very small (less than 10 minutes), so the cost is minimal.

C.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：Amazon ECS適合容器化應用程序，支援任務調度，但需要額外的配置和資源管理。錯誤原因：ECS 設定起來比 Lambda 更複雜，而且對於長期任務來說不如 Lambda 划算。
C.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Amazon ECS is suitable for containerized applications and supports task scheduling, but requires additional configuration and resource management. Reason for the error: ECS is more complex to set up than Lambda, and is not as cost-effective as Lambda for long-term tasks.

D.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：EC2 Spot 執行個體成本較低，但有中斷風險，不適合需要計畫執行的任務。錯誤原因：雖然Spot實例成本低廉，但運行一週仍然不如Lambda划算。
D.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: EC2 Spot Instances are low-cost, but have the risk of interruption and are not suitable for tasks that require scheduled execution. Reason for the error: Although Spot Instances are low-cost, running for a week is still not as cost-effective as Lambda.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 AWS Lambda 中執行該程式。建立 Amazon EventBridge 規則以在請求報告時執行 Lambda 函數。
answer_text.en: B. Run the program in AWS Lambda. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to run a Lambda function when reports are requested.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (82%)； C (18%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能分析：AWS Lambda是一種無伺服器計費服務，按使用時間計費，非常適合耗時的任務。結合EventBridge可以實現事件驅動的自動觸發。 Lambda函數只在需要的時候運行，而且運行時間很小（不到10分鐘），因此成本最小。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (82%); C (18%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance analysis: AWS Lambda is a serverless billing service that is billed by usage time and is very suitable for time-consuming tasks. The combination of EventBridge can realize event-driven automated triggering. The Lambda function only runs when needed, and the running time is very small (less than 10 minutes), so the cost is minimal.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 雲端中設計緊密耦合的高效能運算 (HPC) 環境。該公司需要包含優化 HPC 網路和儲存環境的功能。哪種解決方案組合可以滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company is designing a tightly coupled high performance computing (HPC) environment in the AWS Cloud. The company needs to include features that will optimize the HPC environment for networking and storage. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 在 AWS Global Accelerator 中建立加速器。為加速器配置自訂路由。
A.en: Create an accelerator in AWS Global Accelerator. Configure custom routing for the accelerator.

B.zh: 建立 Amazon FSx for Lustre 檔案系統。使用臨時儲存設定檔系統。
B.en: Create an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system. Configure the file system with scratch storage.

C.zh: 建立 Amazon CloudFront 分配。將檢視器協定策略配置為 HTTP 和 HTTPS。
C.en: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure the viewer protocol policy to be HTTP and HTTPS.

D.zh: 啟動 Amazon EC2 執行個體。將 Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) 連接到執行個體。
D.en: Launch Amazon EC2 instances. Attach an Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) to the instances.

E.zh: 建立 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 部署來管理環境。
E.en: Create an AWS Elastic Beanstalk deployment to manage the environment.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Global Accelerator 是一項全球流量管理服務，主要旨在優化跨區域的網路效能，並非專為高效能運算而設計。不適合HPC環境下的內部網路優化。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS Global Accelerator is a global traffic management service primarily designed to optimize network performance across regions and is not specifically designed for high-performance computing. It is not suitable for internal network optimization in HPC environments.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon FSx for Lustre 是專為高效能運算而設計的檔案系統，提供低延遲、高吞吐量的儲存解決方案。使用臨時儲存可以滿足 HPC 環境中快速儲存的需求。
B.en: Correct. Amazon FSx for Luster is a file system designed specifically for high-performance computing, providing a low-latency, high-throughput storage solution. The need for fast storage in HPC environments can be met using scratch storage.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon CloudFront 是一項內容交付網路 (CDN) 服務，主要用於優化內容交付，而不是用於 HPC 環境的內部網路或儲存最佳化。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) service designed primarily to optimize content delivery rather than for internal network or storage optimization of HPC environments.

D.zh: 正確。Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) 是一種網路接口，專門設計用於支援高效能運算應用程式的低延遲、高吞吐量通訊。它非常適合 HPC 環境。
D.en: Correct. The Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) is a network interface specifically designed to support low-latency, high-throughput communication for high-performance computing applications. It is ideal for HPC environments.

E.zh: 錯誤。AWS Elastic Beanstalk 是一項應用程式部署和管理服務，旨在設計和最佳化 Web 應用程式和後端服務，而不是 HPC 環境。
E.en: Incorrect. AWS Elastic Beanstalk is an application deployment and management service intended for the design and optimization of web applications and backend services, not HPC environments.

answer_text.zh: B. 建立 Amazon FSx for Lustre 檔案系統。使用臨時儲存設定檔系統。；D. 啟動 Amazon EC2 執行個體。將 Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) 連接到執行個體。
answer_text.en: B. Create an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system. Configure the file system with scratch storage.; D. Launch Amazon EC2 instances. Attach an Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) to the instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BD (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon FSx for Lustre 是專為高效能運算而設計的檔案系統，提供低延遲、高吞吐量的儲存解決方案。使用臨時儲存可以滿足 HPC 環境中快速儲存的需求。；Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) 是一種網路接口，專門設計用於支援高效能運算應用程式的低延遲、高吞吐量通訊。它非常適合 HPC 環境。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon FSx for Luster is a file system designed specifically for high-performance computing, providing a low-latency, high-throughput storage solution. The need for fast storage in HPC environments can be met using scratch storage.; The Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) is a network interface specifically designed to support low-latency, high-throughput communication for high-performance computing applications. It is ideal for HPC environments.
